items.title: US Democrat Ro Khanna says he was detained by armed Israeli settlers
items.dek: Khanna, 49, was visiting the occupied West Bank when he was held for 90 minutes, he says.
items.body: Khanna, 49, was visiting the occupied West Bank when he was held for 90 minutes, he says.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump administration subpoenas New York Times journalists over Air Force One reporting
items.dek: The reporters received the legal summons after they reported on alleged security issues with the president's new plane, which was gifted by Qatar.
items.body: The reporters received the legal summons after they reported on alleged security issues with the president's new plane, which was gifted by Qatar.
items.author: IriLine Desk
